# Strings that MUST NOT be flagged by DefaultRedactPatterns.
# Each entry catches a potential false-positive.

# Prose that mentions credential words (no assignment, no space-separated token)
please use a password manager to store your credentials
the api key was rotated last tuesday
store your api keys in the vault
the secret was kept between them
always use secret sharing for sensitive data

# Words containing the stem but no assignment
tokenize the input string
tokenized output
tokenizer.go
passwordless authentication is preferred
secretary filed the paperwork
the passenger manifest was updated

# Password/token/secret family without a trailing value
password =
token:
secret:
api_key=
bearer

# AWS negatives (wrong length, wrong prefix, wrong context)
AKIAshort
AKIA1234567890ABCDE
AKIB1234567890ABCDEF0
order-AKIA-ticket-number

# GitHub negatives (wrong length)
ghp_123
ghp_short
example uses ghp_ in docs

# Slack negatives (wrong prefix or too short)
xoxo-chocolate
xoxq-not-a-token
xoxb-9
version ghp2-release

# JWT negatives (missing segments)
eyJsomething
eyJsomething.eyJelse
notevenbase64.something.else

# PEM negatives (not a header)
PRIVATE KEY file is missing
look for the PEM header in the output
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

# Prose that mentions "bearer" without a trailing identifier
unbearable
Please bear with us

# Random strings that look key-ish but aren't the expected shapes
order-ASIA-ticket
version 2.0.1 release
